name: Surfimon
description: Although it is an Aquatic-species Digimon, it is a Digimon that has been improved so that it can move quickly, even out of water. Its pride is high and it has a lone wolf personality that hates schooling like fish. Its Special Moves are rotating the spikes growing over its body like that of a chainsaw to attack and defend simultaneously ( Barrier Blade ), and accelerating to the speed of light and charging with the " Dash Slider " hoverboard it projects from the third eye on its head ( Lightning Cutter ).
